title: Disposable 5 Compartment Bagasse Plates (11 x 9 inch, 50 Pack) – Heavy Duty Biodegradable Meal Trays | Compostable Paper Plates, Eco-Friendly Food-Safe Divided Trays for Parties School Lunch Catering
features: 𝟓 𝐂𝐎𝐌𝐏𝐀𝐑𝐓𝐌𝐄𝐍𝐓 𝐏𝐋𝐀𝐓𝐄𝐒 – 𝐍𝐎 𝐌𝐈𝐗𝐄𝐃 𝐅𝐋𝐀𝐕𝐎𝐔𝐑𝐒: Divided 5CP plates keep food separated and neatly organised, preventing sauces, curries, and desserts from spilling together. Perfect for schools, buffets, restaurants, catering events, takeaways, and family parties.

𝟏𝟎𝟎% 𝐒𝐔𝐆𝐀𝐑𝐂𝐀𝐍𝐄 𝐅𝐈𝐁𝐑𝐄 – 𝐂𝐎𝐌𝐏𝐎𝐒𝐓𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 𝐏𝐀𝐏𝐄𝐑 𝐏𝐋𝐀𝐓𝐄𝐒: Made from bagasse (sugarcane fibre), these disposable dinner plates are plastic-free, tree-free, BPA-free, and fully compostable. A sustainable, eco-friendly choice that replaces flimsy paper or styrofoam trays.

𝐇𝐄𝐀𝐕𝐘-𝐃𝐔𝐓𝐘, 𝐋𝐄𝐀𝐊-𝐏𝐑𝐎𝐎𝐅 & 𝐂𝐔𝐓-𝐑𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐒𝐓𝐀𝐍𝐓: Stronger than regular disposable plates – these rigid bagasse trays won’t bend, crack, or leak, even with oily curries, greasy burgers, pizza, pasta, chicken, or desserts. Reliable plates for hot and cold meals.

𝐄𝐂𝐎-𝐅𝐑𝐈𝐄𝐍𝐃𝐋𝐘 & 𝐄𝐀𝐒𝐘 𝐂𝐋𝐄𝐀𝐍𝐔𝐏: 100% biodegradable and compostable plates break down naturally after use. Simply toss into compost or recycling bins – a guilt-free, eco-conscious solution for homes, businesses, catering, and wholesale buyers.

𝐌𝐈𝐂𝐑𝐎𝐖𝐀𝐕𝐄 & 𝐅𝐑𝐄𝐄𝐙𝐄𝐑 𝐒𝐀𝐅𝐄: Safe for reheating leftovers or freezing prepared meals. These eco-friendly 5 compartment plates do not melt, warp, or leak, making them ideal for both household meal prep and professional food service.
description: Product Description Ask Packaging 5 Compartment Bagasse Plates 11 x 9 Inch Experience clean, organised dining with Ask Packaging’s 5 Compartment Bagasse Plates . Designed to keep meals neatly separated, these durable plates feature five deep sections for main dishes, sides, salads, fruits, and desserts — ensuring every meal looks tidy and appetising. Previous page Next page 1 School Lunch Tray 2 Picnic 3 Buffet 4 Daily Use Heavy-Duty Strength You Can Trust Tired of flimsy plates that bend or leak? Ask Packaging 5-Compartment Bagasse Plates are built to last. Made from 100% sugarcane fibre , they’re rigid, oil-resistant, leak-proof and water-resistant — perfect for heavy meals, parties, and catering use. Reheat your food safely without leaks or warping. Ask Packaging 5 Compartment Bagasse Plates are microwave-safe, oil-resistant, and heat-stable, keeping meals hot, fresh, and delicious. Are these 5-compartment plates safe to use in the microwave? Yes, these Ask Packaging Bagasse Plates are 100% microwave-safe and heat-resistant. You can safely reheat meals without warping, melting, or leaking — unlike plastic or foam trays. Can I use these plates for oily or saucy foods? Absolutely. Each plate is oil-proof and leak-resistant, perfect for curries, gravies, or greasy meals. The strong bagasse material keeps food contained and your table clean. Are these plates strong enough for heavy meals? Yes, they’re heavy-duty and rigid — no bending or cracking even when loaded with rice, meat, or pasta. Ideal for buffets, catering, and events where reliability matters. Can I use these plates for cold foods or freezer storage? Yes, the plates are freezer-safe and moisture-resistant, making them perfect for salads, desserts, and frozen meals. They stay strong and don’t become soggy even after refrigeration. 5 Compartment Bagasse Plates for Sustainable Dining Upgrade your dining experience with our 5 Compartment Bagasse Plates, designed for strength, cleanliness, and convenience. Made from natural sugarcane fibre, these plates provide a reliable and durable option for homes, restaurants, and catering events. The smart divided layout keeps food neatly separated and prevents flavours from mixing, ensuring an organised and appetising meal presentation. Built to handle both hot and cold dishes, the sturdy design resists leaks, bending, and cracking. Safe for use in microwaves and freezers, these plates offer everyday practicality for quick reheating or storage. A smarter, safer alternative to plastic or foam plates — perfect for modern dining with less mess and more confidence.
